variants: Fatma Fikri specializes in the real estate industry as part of her role at Lavender Stem Realtors, leveraging her education from Shadewood Business School. Her professional responsibilities are complemented by her commitment to civic engagement, as she serves as Donor Relations for Raindrop Health Forum. With her written contributions featured in the publication Polar Bear Lantern, Fatma shares her insights on community matters. Additionally, she works in Thai script, expanding her communication skills within diverse cultural contexts.
